checks.name: required_files_present
checks.details: All files requested by the user are present under the workspace.

checks.name: json_artifacts_parse
checks.details: manifest.json, definition-of-done.json, working/01-intent.json, working/03-rightsize-plan.json, and working/validation-report.json parse as JSON.

checks.name: formal_tdd_toc
checks.details: final/technical-design-document.md includes a formal table of contents and the full TDD section set required by the prompt.

checks.name: prd_requirement_coverage
checks.details: Final TDD addresses topic catalog, hierarchy, page profiles, source selection, evidence retrieval, grounded rendering, traceability, benchmark isolation, strict validators, fail-closed behavior, known gaps, reporting, and bounded repair.

checks.name: benchmark_isolation
checks.details: Final TDD repeatedly marks benchmark material as comparator-only and excludes it from evidence, headings, prose, claims, required topics, and citation sources.

checks.name: strict_validator_preservation
checks.details: Design preserves or strengthens existing citation, malformed-token, unsupported-identifier, placeholder, truncation, context-artifact, evidence, generated coverage, and freshness validators.

checks.name: phase3_determinism
checks.details: Design keeps Phase 3 deterministic and LLM-free; source selection is deterministic before retrieval.

checks.name: bounded_repair_policy
checks.details: Repair is limited to LLM-authored page plans and claim plans with exact diagnostics, audit artifacts, hard caps, and strict revalidation.

checks.name: module_naming_grounding
checks.details: Existing modules are identified separately from inferred new modules.

checks.name: code_not_edited
checks.details: Only documentation workspace files were created; no source code files were edited.
